day2_night_start.name: Me
day2_night_start.text: *Home. I check my phone again. The old school group chat... I'm the only one left. Everyone else left the chat.*

day2_night_2.name: Me
day2_night_2.text: *I tried calling my old homeroom teacher. 'This number is no longer in service.' ...What?*

day2_night_3.name: Me
day2_night_3.text: *Changed numbers? I tried other friends too, but they all go unanswered or are disconnected.*

day2_night_4.name: Me
day2_night_4.text: *...This is weird. There's no way everyone's unreachable. I'll ask Ms. Eunsu tomorrow. Let's just sleep.*

day2_night_dream_2.name: Me
day2_night_dream_2.text: *I'm walking down a dark hallway. This is... the school? The school corridor at night. Only my footsteps echo.*

day2_night_dream_4.name: Me
day2_night_dream_4.text: *I turned around. No one there. But I definitely heard it. A girl's voice. And at the end of the corridor... was that blood...?*

day2_night_wake.name: Me
day2_night_wake.text: *...! I jolt awake, drenched in sweat. It was a dream. Just a dream. ...Right?*
